creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 254454
Patch for libsidplayfp

Compile tested on FreeBSD 14.1-RELEASE (amd64) (make, make check-plist)

Poudriere testport OK 14.1-RELEASE (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 13.3-RELEASE (amd64)

Tested with following consumers in 14.1-RELEASE (amd64) using Poudriere:
audio/sidplayfp
multimedia/audacious-plugins
multimedia/qmmp-qt5
multimedia/qmmp-qt6
